description: Per-channel Whisper initial_prompt values. Biases decoding toward game/character names, streamer-specific slang, emotes. Whisper constraint: prompt must be <= 224 tokens (approximately 170 words). Per ClippingResearch.md §8.3 'Streamer-slang biasing'.
default_prompt: Twitch livestream. Common terms: pog, poggers, W, L, clip it, sub, gifted sub, bit, cheer, raid, gg, copium, sadge, monkaS, KEKW, LULW, POGGERS, GIGACHAD, Sadge, PogChamp.
match_policy_description: filename_substrings are checked case-insensitively against VOD basename. First matching channel wins. When no channel matches, default_prompt is used.

example_gaming_channel.description: Template — copy this block and edit for your own channels. Add entries per streamer as needed; changes picked up on next pipeline run.
example_gaming_channel.initial_prompt: Channel-specific livestream. Game titles, character names, recurring guests, common in-jokes and catchphrases go here. Keep under 224 tokens.
example_gaming_channel._notes: The initial_prompt biases Whisper's decoder — rare or channel-specific tokens you list here are more likely to be transcribed correctly. Don't include speech transcripts here, just a vocabulary hint.

valorant.description: Generic Valorant gameplay prompt — activates on any VOD with 'valorant' in the filename.
valorant.initial_prompt: Valorant ranked gameplay. Agents: Jett Reyna Phoenix Sage Omen Brimstone Cypher Sova Viper Killjoy Skye Yoru Astra KAY/O Chamber Neon Fade Harbor Gekko Deadlock Iso Clove Vyse. Maps: Bind Haven Split Ascent Icebox Breeze Fracture Pearl Lotus Sunset Abyss. Terms: ace, clutch, flick, peek, OP, Operator, Phantom, Vandal, Radiant, Immortal, Diamond.

league.initial_prompt: League of Legends gameplay. Lanes: top mid jungle bot ADC support. Terms: gank, roam, ward, pink, baron, dragon, herald, elder, pentakill, quadra, triple kill, ace. Common champs: Yasuo Zed Ahri Lee Sin Thresh Lulu Jinx Caitlyn Ezreal Lux Katarina.
